nodes.context: Organized crime network active in Europe, post-Soviet states, and Israel; controls many thieves-in-law.
Major Georgian criminal clan from Kutaisi, led by Tariel Oniani; active in Russia and Europe.
Major Georgian criminal clan from Tbilisi, led by Aslan Usoyan; active in Russia and Europe.
Georgian nationalist militia formed by former thief-in-law Jaba Ioseliani; engaged in protection rackets and smuggling.
Georgian nationalist militia led by ex-convict Tengiz Kitovani; engaged in protection rackets and smuggling.
Fictional crime syndicate in Georgia from the film Extraction 2.

edges.context: The Kutaisi Clan is a major component of the Georgian mafia.
The Tbilisi Clan is a major component of the Georgian mafia.
Violent feud between the Kutaisi and Tbilisi clans, led by Tariel Oniani and Aslan Usoyan respectively.
Mkhedrioni was led by former thief-in-law Jaba Ioseliani, a member of the Georgian mafia.
The National Guard was led by ex-convict Tengiz Kitovani, but not directly part of the Georgian mafia.
